title: More Cherries
description: Adds more Cherry Leaves and redesigns the Pink Petals
body:
# More Cherries **Hi!** In this texture pack I added more variants for Cherry Leaves and changed Pink Petals! Now you won't see the green stems because the Petals lie directly on the ground. Also added a new icon for these cute petals :D
**Hope you like it!**
